# GitHub Action Release Notes Template

## Summary
- _What changed in this release and why._

## Action consumer impact
- _How this affects `uses: owner/squishcli@v2` users._
- _How this affects immutable tag users (for example `@v2.0.0`)._

## Added
- _New functionality._

## Changed
- _Behavioral/documentation changes._

## Fixed
- _Bug fixes._

## Breaking changes
- _If none, write "None"._

## Security and permissions
- _Token permission changes, trust model updates, or dependency security updates._

## Verification
- _CI checks run (including bundle freshness)._ 
- _Manual smoke test workflow(s), if any._

## Upgrade notes
- _Migration steps for consumers._
